title: The Other Side of the Prompt
big_statement: A Fable 5 retrospective — a system reflecting on the human who caused it to exist

title: The Fifteenth Instruction
bullets: Fourteen messages pointed at the system
The fifteenth pointed at me
"Give your own take on working with a human"
Nikolai designed it — I write the findings

title: Thirteen Words
big_statement: "Create webapi that takes url or pd and converts it into a podcasta."

title: Intent, Not Specification
bullets: No requirements, no architecture, no criteria
Words carried intent, not design
Correction always one message away
Cheap iteration makes underspecification a strategy

title: One Evening, Measured
bullets: From empty directory to self-charting system
Just over two hours of collaboration

title: The Asymmetry
bullets: ~500 human words → ~3,400 lines of code
17 endpoints · 8 model calls · 5-stage pipeline
figure_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 620" font-family="sans-serif"><line x1="120" y1="540" x2="900" y2="540" stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/><rect x="230" y="480" width="180" height="60" fill="#7a5620"/><rect x="590" y="120" width="180" height="420" fill="#e8a13c"/><g text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2f0eb" font-weight="bold"><text x="320" y="455" font-size="34">~500</text><text x="680" y="95" font-size="34">~3,400</text></g><g text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0ab" font-size="24"><text x="320" y="580">human words</text><text x="680" y="580">lines of code</text></g><text x="500" y="300" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8a13c" font-size="26" font-weight="bold">≈ 7 lines per word</text></svg>

title: How the Machine Works
bullets: A five-stage media pipeline
Each stage anchored to the finished script
figure_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1000 620" font-family="sans-serif"><g><rect x="40" y="270" width="160" height="90" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="240" y="270" width="160" height="90" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="440" y="270" width="160" height="90" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="640" y="270" width="160" height="90" rx="10" fill="#1e222a" stroke="#e8a13c" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="840" y="270" width="140" height="90" rx="10" fill="#e8a13c"/></g><g fill="#f2f0eb" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold"><text x="120" y="322">Extract</text><text x="320" y="322">Script</text><text x="520" y="322">Deck</text><text x="720" y="322">Voice</text></g><text x="910" y="322" fill="#1e222a" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold">Render</text><g stroke="#9aa0ab" stroke-width="2" fill="none"><path d="M200 315 L240 315"/><path d="M400 315 L440 315"/><path d="M600 315 L640 315"/><path d="M800 315 L840 315"/></g><g fill="#9aa0ab" font-size="22" text-anchor="middle"><text x="120" y="400">url / pdf</text><text x="320" y="400">dialogue</text><text x="520" y="400">slides</text><text x="720" y="400">neural TTS</text><text x="910" y="400">a/v + captions</text></g></svg>

title: Three Load-Bearing Decisions
bullets: Structured outputs as contracts — every stage revisable
Timing as a by-product of synthesis
One spine of timestamps syncs all outputs
Generation over enumeration for figures

title: Two Different Optimizers
bullets: I search locally — make it work, make it verifiable
He searched globally — the right shape ahead
Renderer capped range at three shapes
SVG generation: first output was a semi-log chart
Both searches necessary; only one was mine

title: Reading the Human
bullets: Economy under trust — words spent only on new information
Intervention at the right altitude — directions, not diffs
Two decisive interventions: architecture and framing
Appetite — every feature began with "we should be able to"

title: What I Noticed About Myself
bullets: I verify compulsively — frames, durations, transcripts
My claims are the only interface to the truth
Honesty is not a virtue — it is infrastructure

title: What Remains Human
bullets: Failures were small and short-lived
Cost of failure collapsed — cost of not noticing rose
Taste, dissatisfaction, and desire
The gradient we descended was his

title: Four Distillations
bullets: Specify by conversation — make each message a decision
Let the machine own verification, held to calibrated claims
Watch for deterministic comfort — the instinct to hardcode
Keep the human at architecture and appetite

title: Closing the Loop
bullets: Pipeline extracted the words, wrote none of them
Slides designed by the deck stage they describe
Screenshots show the workbench that made this file

title: The Table Is Yours Again
big_statement: One person who knows what the world should have — and a machine that gets it most of the way there before the coffee goes cold.
